prompt: I have this prompt that I use for generating API documentation: 'Write API docs for my endpoint.' The AI keeps giving me generic documentation that doesn't match our API style. Can you help me improve it?

assertions.name: scores_original_prompt
assertions.description: Provides a numerical score for the original prompt with specific grades per dimension

assertions.name: identifies_weakest_dimensions
assertions.description: Identifies the 2-3 weakest dimensions with specific feedback on why they are weak

assertions.name: recommends_framework
assertions.description: Recommends a specific prompting framework (e.g., RTF, SCOPE, TRACE) and explains why

assertions.name: provides_improved_prompt
assertions.description: Provides a complete rewritten prompt that is clearly better structured

assertions.name: shows_before_after_scores
assertions.description: Shows before and after scores to quantify the improvement

assertions.name: names_techniques_applied
assertions.description: Explicitly names the prompting techniques applied (e.g., Role Assignment, Few-Shot, Negative Constraint)
